elements.short: Details of a Technology mediated contact point (phone, fax, email, etc.)
elements.definition: Details for all kinds of technology mediated contact points for a person or organization, including telephone, email, etc.
Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces.

May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension.

elements.short: phone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
elements.definition: Telecommunications form for contact point - what communications system is required to make use of the contact.
The actual contact point details, in a form that is meaningful to the designated communication system (i.e. phone number or email address).

elements.short: home | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
elements.definition: Identifies the purpose for the contact point.

elements.short: Specify preferred order of use (1 = highest)
elements.definition: Specifies a preferred order in which to use a set of contacts. ContactPoints with lower rank values are more preferred than those with higher rank values.

elements.short: Time period when the contact point was/is in use
elements.definition: Time period when the contact point was/is in use.

description: Base StructureDefinition for ContactPoint Type: Details for all kinds of technology mediated contact points for a person or organization, including telephone, email, etc.
